mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CHAT_ROOM.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM ( room_id, room_type, festival_id, owner_id, room_title, room_description, free_location, free_date, max_capacity, created_at, room_image ) VALUES ( #{room_id}, #{room_type}, #{festival_id}, #{owner_id}, #{room_title}, #{room_description}, #{free_location}, TO_DATE(#{free_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{max_capacity}, SYSDATE, #{room_image} )

INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM_USER ( seq, room_id, member_id, joined_at, last_read_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_CHAT_ROOM_USER.NEXTVAL, #{room_id}, #{member_id}, CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' AS DATE), SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' )
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, res.* FROM ( SELECT cr.room_id AS "room_id", LOWER(cr.room_type) AS "room_type", cr.festival_id AS "festival_id", cr.owner_id AS "owner_id", cr.room_title AS "room_title", cr.room_description AS "room_description", cr.free_location AS "free_location", TO_CHAR(cr.free_date, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS "free_date", cr.max_capacity AS "max_capacity", TO_CHAR(cr.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "created_at", cr.room_image AS "room_image", m.nickname AS "nickname", m.profile_image_url AS "profile_image_url", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_user cru WHERE cru.room_id = cr.room_id) AS "current_count",
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_user WHERE room_id = cr.room_id AND member_id = #{member_id})
0 AS "is_joined" FROM chat_room cr LEFT JOIN member m ON cr.owner_id = m.member_id WHERE cr.room_type = 'GROUP' AND NVL(cr.status, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE'
AND cr.room_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY cr.room_id DESC ) res ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room WHERE room_type = 'GROUP' AND NVL(status, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE'
AND room_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

choose.when: SELECT cr.room_id, cr.room_type, cr.festival_id, cr.owner_id, cr.status, NVL(cr.room_title, fi.title || ' 공식 모임') AS room_title, NVL(cr.room_description, NVL(fi.overview, fi.title || ' 공식 모임방입니다.')) AS room_description, NVL(cr.free_location, fi.addr1) AS free_location, NVL(TO_CHAR(cr.free_date, 'YYYY.MM.DD'), SUBSTR(fi.event_start_date, 1, 4) || '.' || SUBSTR(fi.event_start_date, 5, 2) || '.' || SUBSTR(fi.event_start_date, 7, 2) || ' ~ ' || SUBSTR(fi.event_end_date, 1, 4) || '.' || SUBSTR(fi.event_end_date, 5, 2) || '.' || SUBSTR(fi.event_end_date, 7, 2)) AS free_date, NVL(cr.max_capacity, 500) AS max_capacity, cr.created_at, m.nickname, m.profile_image_url, NVL(cr.room_image, fi.first_image) AS room_image, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_user cru WHERE cru.room_id = cr.room_id) AS current_count FROM chat_room cr LEFT JOIN member m ON cr.owner_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN festival_info fi ON cr.festival_id = fi.content_id WHERE cr.room_id = #{roomId} AND (cr.festival_id IS NULL OR fi.is_visible = 'Y')
choose.otherwise: SELECT #{roomId} AS room_id, 'FESTIVAL' AS room_type, fi.content_id AS festival_id, NULL AS owner_id, 'ACTIVE' AS status, fi.title || ' 공식 모임' AS room_title, NVL(fi.overview, fi.title || ' 공식 모임방입니다. 함께 갈 메이트를 구해보세요!') AS room_description, fi.addr1 AS free_location, SUBSTR(fi.event_start_date, 1, 4) || '.' || SUBSTR(fi.event_start_date, 5, 2) || '.' || SUBSTR(fi.event_start_date, 7, 2) || ' ~ ' || SUBSTR(fi.event_end_date, 1, 4) || '.' || SUBSTR(fi.event_end_date, 5, 2) || '.' || SUBSTR(fi.event_end_date, 7, 2) AS free_date, 500 AS max_capacity, SYSDATE AS created_at, NULL AS nickname, NULL AS profile_image_url, fi.first_image AS room_image, 0 AS current_count FROM festival_info fi WHERE fi.content_id = ABS(#{roomId}) AND fi.is_visible = 'Y'

mapper.update: UPDATE CHAT_ROOM SET room_title = #{room_title}, room_description = #{room_description}, free_location = #{free_location}, free_date = TO_DATE(#{free_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), max_capacity = #{max_capacity}, room_image = #{room_image} WHERE room_id = #{room_id}
mapper.select: SELECT m.member_id AS "member_id", m.nickname AS "nickname", m.profile_image_url AS "profile_image_url", CASE WHEN cr.owner_id = cru.member_id THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS "is_owner" FROM chat_room_user cru JOIN member m ON cru.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN chat_room cr ON cru.room_id = cr.room_id WHERE cru.room_id = #{room_id} AND m.status != 'DELETED' ORDER BY "is_owner" DESC, m.nickname ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id AS "member_id", m.nickname AS "nickname", m.profile_image_url AS "profile_image_url", 'N' AS "is_owner" FROM chat_room_user cru JOIN member m ON cru.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN chat_room cr ON cru.room_id = cr.room_id WHERE cru.room_id = #{room_id} AND m.status != 'DELETED' AND (cr.owner_id IS NULL OR cru.member_id != cr.owner_id) ORDER BY m.nickname ASC
SELECT max_capacity AS "MAX_CAPACITY", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_user WHERE room_id = #{room_id}) AS "CURRENT_COUNT" FROM chat_room WHERE room_id = #{room_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM_USER ( seq, room_id, member_id, joined_at, last_read_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_CHAT_ROOM_USER.NEXTVAL, #{room_id}, #{member_id}, CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' AS DATE), SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CHAT_ROOM_USER WHERE room_id = #{room_id} AND member_id = #{member_id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, res.* FROM ( SELECT NVL(cr.room_id, -fi.content_id) AS "room_id", NVL(LOWER(cr.room_type), 'festival') AS "room_type", fi.content_id AS "festival_id", cr.owner_id AS "owner_id", NVL(cr.room_title, fi.title || ' 공식 모임') AS "room_title", NVL(cr.room_description, fi.title || ' 공식 모임방입니다.') AS "room_description", NVL(cr.free_location, fi.addr1) AS "free_location", SUBSTR(fi.event_start_date, 1, 4) || '.' || SUBSTR(fi.event_start_date, 5, 2) || '.' || SUBSTR(fi.event_start_date, 7, 2) || ' ~ ' || SUBSTR(fi.event_end_date, 1, 4) || '.' || SUBSTR(fi.event_end_date, 5, 2) || '.' || SUBSTR(fi.event_end_date, 7, 2) AS "free_date", NVL(cr.max_capacity, 500) AS "max_capacity", cr.created_at AS "created_at", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_user cru WHERE cru.room_id = cr.room_id) AS "current_count", NVL(cr.room_image, fi.first_image) AS "room_image",
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_user WHERE room_id = cr.room_id AND member_id = #{member_id})
0 AS "is_joined" FROM festival_info fi LEFT JOIN chat_room cr ON fi.content_id = cr.festival_id AND cr.room_type = 'FESTIVAL'
fi.is_visible = 'Y' AND (cr.room_id IS NULL OR NVL(cr.status, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE')
AND (cr.room_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR (cr.room_title IS NULL AND fi.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'))
ORDER BY fi.event_start_date DESC ) res ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM festival_info fi LEFT JOIN chat_room cr ON fi.content_id = cr.festival_id AND cr.room_type = 'FESTIVAL'
fi.is_visible = 'Y' AND (cr.room_id IS NULL OR NVL(cr.status, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE')
AND (cr.room_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR (cr.room_title IS NULL AND fi.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room cr JOIN chat_room_user cru ON cr.room_id = cru.room_id LEFT JOIN festival_info fi ON cr.festival_id = fi.content_id WHERE cru.member_id = #{member_id} AND cr.room_type IN ('FESTIVAL', 'GROUP') AND (cr.festival_id IS NULL OR fi.is_visible = 'Y') AND cr.room_type = 'FESTIVAL' AND cr.room_type = 'GROUP' AND cr.owner_id = #{member_id}
AND (cr.room_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR (cr.room_title IS NULL AND fi.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'))

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT cr.ROOM_ID as "roomId", cr.ROOM_TYPE as "roomType", cr.FESTIVAL_ID as "festivalId", cr.OWNER_ID as "ownerId", NVL(cr.ROOM_TITLE, fi.TITLE || ' 공식 모임') as "roomTitle", cr.ROOM_DESCRIPTION as "roomDescription", NVL(cr.FREE_LOCATION, fi.ADDR1) as "freeLocation", NVL(cr.FREE_DATE, TO_DATE(fi.EVENT_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) as "freeDate", TO_DATE(fi.EVENT_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') as "endDate", cr.MAX_CAPACITY as "maxCapacity", NVL(cr.ROOM_IMAGE, fi.FIRST_IMAGE) as "roomImage", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_ROOM_USER cru WHERE cru.ROOM_ID = cr.ROOM_ID) AS "participants" FROM CHAT_ROOM cr LEFT JOIN FESTIVAL_INFO fi ON cr.FESTIVAL_ID = fi.CONTENT_ID WHERE cr.ROOM_TYPE IN ('FESTIVAL', 'GROUP') AND (cr.FESTIVAL_ID IS NULL OR fi.IS_VISIBLE = 'Y') ORDER BY "participants" DESC, cr.CREATED_AT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_ROOM cr LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON cr.OWNER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID
cr.ROOM_TYPE IN ('GROUP', 'FESTIVAL')
AND cr.STATUS = #{status}
AND ( cr.ROOM_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR m.NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(cr.ROOM_ID) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_REPORT WHERE ROOM_ID = cr.ROOM_ID) > 0
SELECT REPORT_ID AS "report_id", ROOM_ID AS "room_id", REPORTER_ID AS "reporter_id", REPORT_REASON AS "report_reason", CREATED_AT AS "created_at" FROM CHAT_REPORT WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId}
SELECT NVL(MAX(HISTORY_ID), 0) FROM MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY ( HISTORY_ID, TARGET_MEMBER_ID, REPORTER_MEMBER_ID, REPORT_TYPE, REPORT_ID, TARGET_ID, REASON, RESULT_STATUS, ADMIN_MEMO, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{historyId}, #{targetMemberId}, #{reporterId}, 'CHAT', #{reportId}, #{roomId}, #{reason}, #{resultStatus}, #{adminMemo}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY WHERE TARGET_ID = #{roomId} AND REPORT_TYPE = 'CHAT'
SELECT REPORT_ID AS "report_id", ROOM_ID AS "room_id", REPORTER_ID AS "reporter_id", REPORT_REASON AS "report_reason", CREATED_AT AS "created_at" FROM CHAT_REPORT WHERE REPORT_ID = #{reportId}

SELECT cr.ROOM_ID AS "id", NVL(cr.ROOM_TITLE, fi.TITLE || ' 공식 모임') AS "title", NVL(m.NICKNAME, '공식') AS "hostNickname", cr.ROOM_TYPE AS "roomType", CASE WHEN cr.ROOM_TYPE = 'GROUP' THEN '자유모임' ELSE '축제모임' END AS "category", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_REPORT WHERE ROOM_ID = cr.ROOM_ID) AS "reports", cr.STATUS AS "status", TO_CHAR(cr.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS "createdAt", ( SELECT LISTAGG(REPORT_REASON, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC) FROM CHAT_REPORT WHERE ROOM_ID = cr.ROOM_ID ) AS "reportReason", ( SELECT MAX(ADMIN_MEMO) FROM MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY WHERE TARGET_ID = cr.ROOM_ID AND REPORT_TYPE = 'CHAT' ) AS "adminMemo" FROM CHAT_ROOM cr LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON cr.OWNER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN FESTIVAL_INFO fi ON cr.FESTIVAL_ID = fi.CONTENT_ID WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_REPORT WHERE ROOM_ID = cr.ROOM_ID) >= 3 ORDER BY "reports" DESC, cr.CREATED_AT DESC
